practicals.details: Qualitative Analysis (Section B Mandatory). Cations include Pb, Cu, Al, Fe, Mn, Ni, Zn, Co, Ca, Sr, Ba, Mg. Anions include CO3, S, SO3, NO3, NO2, Cl, Br, I, SO4, PO4, CH3COO.
